title: entada spiralis
intro: Entada spiralis, also known as the Spiral Bean or Spiral Pod Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Entada spiralis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Entada spiralis include decoctions, infusions, and powder forms, often used in traditional remedies and supplements.
